    <item>
      <title>How Timberwolves' toughness on the road makes them lethal</title>
      <description>In the same way that Anthony Edwards shunned expectations for medical recovery, the Minnesota Timberwolves had no regard for homecourt advantage in Game 1.</description>

        <media:title> Minnesota Timberwolves guard Anthony Edwards (5) shoots over San Antonio Spurs guard Devin Vassell (24) in the second half during game one of the second round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Frost Bank Center. </media:title>

    <item>
      <title>Cade Cunningham gives first comments after Pistons' Game 1 win over Cavaliers</title>
      <description>The Detroit Pistons pulled off a dominant win over the Cleveland Cavaliers on Monday in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals, with a 111-101 final score in downtown Detroit. </description>
      <pubDate>05 May 2026 23:09:01 -0400</pubDate>

        <media:credit> Rick Osentoski-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Detroit Pistons guard Cade Cunningham dribbles defended by Cleveland Cavaliers guard Max Strus in the second half during Game 1 of the second round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Little Caesars Arena. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>

      <title>Victor Wembanyama's offensive woes spoil historic defensive effort in Game 1 loss to Timberwolves</title>

    <item>
      <title>Pistons' buzzer-beaters make big impact in Game 1 win</title>

    <item>
      <title>Jalen Brunson, Knicks make history with third-straight blowout win</title>
      <description>With their series-opening win over the Philadelphia 76ers, the New York Knicks sent a message and continued to look unbeatable. The Knicks grabbed a 1-0 lead in their second-round series, dominating the 76ers to the tune of 137-98. </description>

        <media:title> New York Knicks guard Jalen Brunson (11) brings the ball up court against the Philadelphia 76ers during the first quarter of Game 1 of the Eastern Conference semifinal round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Madison Square Garden. </media:title>
      </media:content>
